ddls:
CREATE TABLE "api_endpoints" (
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API endpoint */,
  "endpoint_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the API endpoint */,
  "endpoint_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the API endpoint */,
  "endpoint_url" TEXT /* Full URL of the API endpoint */,
  "get_method" TEXT /* GET method for the endpoint */,
  "post_method" TEXT /* POST method for the endpoint */,
  "delete_method" TEXT /* DELETE method for the endpoint */,
  "patch_method" TEXT /* PATCH method for the endpoint */,
  "put_method" TEXT /* PUT method for the endpoint */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the endpoint is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the endpoint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the endpoint was last updated */,
  "rate_limit_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the rate_limits table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_endpoints_rate_limit_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_limit_id") REFERENCES rate_limits ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_applications" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client application */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client application */,
  "client_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the client application */,
  "client_url" TEXT /* URL of the client application */,
  "client_secret" TEXT /* Secret key for the client application */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the client application is active */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the client application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the client application */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the client application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_applications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_applications_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client application */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated API endpoint */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the connection (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "connection_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the connection */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the connection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the connection */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the connection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES client_applications ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_credentials" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device credential */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client application associated with the credential */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the device */,
  "credential_value" TEXT /* Credential value for the device */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credential was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the device credential */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the device credential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_credentials_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_credentials_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_credentials_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES client_applications ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client application making the request */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API endpoint being accessed */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request made (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* HTTP response code for the request */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to process the request (in milliseconds) */,
  "request_size" INTEGER /* Size of the request in bytes */,
  "response_size" INTEGER /* Size of the response in bytes */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_usage_logs_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_usage_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES client_applications ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_limits" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate limit record */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint to which the limit applies */,
  "rate_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the rate limit */,
  "limit_per_day" INTEGER /* Maximum number of requests allowed per day */,
  "limit_per_minute" INTEGER /* Maximum number of requests allowed per minute */,
  "limit_per_hour" INTEGER /* Maximum number of requests allowed per hour */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the limit was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rate limit was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the rate limit */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the rate limit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_limits_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_limits_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_limits_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the reset */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Token used for the reset process */,
  "is_used" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the reset token has been used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reset request was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reset token expires */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reset request */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the reset request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
